name: mineralvision
description: MineralVision — one-command launcher for client + server + ml-service

scripts.start: concurrently -k -n ML,API,WEB -c magenta,cyan,green "npm run start:ml" "npm run start:api" "npm run start:web"
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix server install && npm --prefix client install
scripts.setup:ml: cd ml-service && python -m venv venv && venv\Scripts\python -m pip install -r requirements.txt
